penalties.description: Maximum time reached before completion of the return transfers.

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: The task started but was not completed within the maximum allowed duration. Only partial outbound transfers were visible and no return transfers completed, resulting in an incomplete_task penalty.
